text:
---Begin OPTIONS List---
===> The following configuration options are available for slurm-wlm-23.11.1_2:
     CURL=off: Require cURL for elasticsearch plugins
     DOCS=on: Build and/or install documentation
     GUI=off: Build sview GUI config tool
     HDF5=on: Job profiling using HDF5
     HWLOC=on: Portable hardware locality
     IPMI=off: IPMI energy consumption accounting
     RRD=off: RRD external sensor data collection

Default options, builds fine on 14.0 Release

Name           : poudriere-devel
Version        : 3.4.99.20240424

Also portsfallout don't mention any related fails:
https://portsfallout.com/port/22724/

---

Try upgrading host and jail:

Host OSVERSION: 1500012 -> 1500018
Jail OSVERSION: 1400509 -> 1400511

Cheers
